tickets.title: Add retry logic for payment gateway timeouts
tickets.description: When the payment gateway returns a 5xx or times out, implement exponential backoff retry with max 3 attempts.
tickets.acceptance_criteria:
- Retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff
- Log each retry attempt
- Return appropriate error after final failure
tickets.expected_behavior: Payment processing retries on gateway failures with exponential backoff

tickets.title: Implement refund processing endpoint
tickets.description: Create a POST /refunds endpoint that processes full and partial refunds through Stripe, validates refund amount against original charge.
tickets.acceptance_criteria:
- Validate refund amount does not exceed original charge
- Support full and partial refunds
- Record refund in database with status tracking
tickets.expected_behavior: Refund endpoint validates amount, processes through Stripe, and records result

tickets.title: Add webhook handler for Stripe payment events
tickets.description: Implement a webhook endpoint that receives Stripe events (payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.failed, charge.refunded) and updates order status accordingly.
tickets.acceptance_criteria:
- Verify webhook signature
- Handle payment succeeded, failed, and refunded events
- Update order status in database
- Return 200 for processed events, 400 for invalid signatures
tickets.expected_behavior: Webhook receives Stripe events, verifies signature, and updates order status

tickets.title: Generate monthly invoice PDF for customers
tickets.description: Build an invoice generation service that collects all charges for a customer in a billing period, calculates totals with tax, and produces a PDF invoice.
tickets.acceptance_criteria:
- Aggregate charges by billing period
- Calculate subtotal, tax, and total
- Generate PDF with line items
- Store PDF in S3 and record URL in database
tickets.expected_behavior: Invoice service aggregates charges, calculates tax, and generates PDF

tickets.title: Add payment method validation before charging
tickets.description: Before processing a payment, validate that the payment method (card) is not expired, has sufficient info, and passes Luhn check for card number format.
tickets.acceptance_criteria:
- Check card expiration date
- Validate card number format with Luhn algorithm
- Return clear validation errors
- Block payment if validation fails
tickets.expected_behavior: Payment validation checks card expiry and format before allowing charges
